title: <div>  •  Is the document well-structured with an <b>introduction, steps, and co
content:
• Is the document well-structured with an introduction, steps, and conclusion?
• Are the steps logically ordered and easy to follow?
3. Effectiveness of Steps (25 points)
• Are the steps detailed enough to complete the task?
• Are any steps missing or unclear?
• Do the instructions include warnings, tips, or troubleshooting when relevant?
4. Formatting & Visual Appeal (15 points)
• Are headings, lists, and formatting used effectively for readability?
• If applicable, do images, diagrams, or formatting improve comprehension?
5. Grammar & Mechanics (15 points)
• Are there any spelling, grammar, or punctuation errors?
• Is the tone professional and consistent?

⸻

Feedback Format
• I will provide workshop-style feedback letters for each student, explaining what works well and what can be improved.
• Each letter will be structured with strengths, areas for improvement, and suggestions for revision.
context: From document: I have reviewed the Directions for the Technical Instructions Assignment… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/4)
